workflow_rules: 完成每個 phase 後必須先跑 implementation_check.validation_commands
驗證通過後必須更新 runtime_control.json 與 progress.md
每個 completed phase 驗證通過後必須等待使用者明確同意才可 commit
禁止自動 commit；commit 前需向使用者說明檔案範圍與 commit message
禁止未經使用者明確同意重寫 git history
dynamic_loader_note: 每次工作先讀本檔 current_phase 與 phase_path，再讀該 phase 檔並執行 implementation_check。

implementation_check.notes: rg --files passed; uv unavailable in agent shell, equivalent check run with .venv/bin/python -m py_compile

validation_commands: uv run pytest -q tests -k 'text or table'
implementation_check.notes: unit tests passed via .venv/bin/python -m unittest -q tests/test_text_table.py; uv command unavailable in agent shell
render module implemented; tests passed with .venv/bin/python -m unittest -q tests/test_render.py; uv command unavailable in agent shell

vision module implemented for gemini/anthropic/openai with env-first key loading and safe failure; tests passed via .venv/bin/python -m unittest -q tests/test_vision.py; uv command unavailable in agent shell

parse pipeline implemented for pdf/pptx with CLI; --help works; real data parse succeeded (pdf=65 records, pptx=13 records) with --no-vision; stdout JSON pollution from PyMuPDF table hint handled by local redirect

validation_commands: uv run pytest -q tests -k 'index or search or store'
implementation_check.notes: chunk/embed/store/index modules implemented with mock-based unit tests; tests passed via .venv/bin/python -m unittest -q tests/test_index_store.py; uv command unavailable in agent shell
ingest CLI implemented and tests passed; --help works. Real ingest run attempted with --reset --no-vision but blocked by model download DNS failure to huggingface (processed=0, failed=2)

eval_retriever upgraded from keyword hit_rate to Ragas LLM-as-judge context_precision/context_recall; unit tests pass with fake judge. Live Ragas eval loads .env with python-dotenv and passed MVP hard gate with context_recall=1.0 and source_top1_rate=1.0. context_precision=0.5528 is recorded as a diagnostic metric and future tuning target.

FastMCP streamable HTTP server implemented with search/search_by_source/list_documents tools, docs://sources resource, and /health route. Validation: unit tests passed; server started via uv run python mcp_server/server.py; /health returned status ok; MCP streamable HTTP client listed tools and called list_documents successfully. Server was stopped with Ctrl+C after validation.

Dockerfile and zbpack.json added. Validation command cat zbpack.json passed; JSON parsed successfully; ingest --help and py_compile for ingest/server passed. ragas moved to the eval dependency group, and Docker production sync excludes eval-only dependencies with --no-group eval to reduce build time. docker build -t enterprise-doc-mcp . completed; docker run with mounted chroma returned /health status ok with has_data=true; MCP streamable HTTP client listed tools and called list_documents successfully. current_phase advanced to phase-10.

README.md and tests/test_output.log added; README validation command passes and includes run, verify, assumptions, AI workflow, Docker, MCP, and Zeabur instructions. Public Zeabur URL is available at https://enterprise-doc-mcp-yonghuei.zeabur.app/. Added scripts/start_server.py and changed Docker CMD so startup ingest runs before server start. py_compile and ingest/MCP unit tests pass. Redeployed health check returned {"status":"ok","has_data":true}; phase-10 completed.

Task 2 planning phase completed. Scope separates Task 1 remote MCP delivery from Task 2 Claude Skills packaging. Phases 12-14 were created for Skill files, verification evidence, and README documentation. No .claude/skills implementation files were added in phase-11.

Refactored to follow Claude Code Skills pattern: scripts/ directories with symlinks, ${CLAUDE_SKILL_DIR} variable usage, allowed-tools frontmatter, and direct command examples instead of wrapper scripts. Commands now use uv run python so project dependencies are available. Index Skill explicitly says not to run parse first for indexing and accepts --source-dir as a compatibility alias for --data-dir.

validation_commands: env CHROMA_PATH=.cache/task2-skill-chroma uv run python .claude/skills/index-enterprise-documents/scripts/ingest.py --data-dir tests/fixtures/task2-input --reset --no-vision
implementation_check.notes: Refactored to match Skills script pattern: tests verify structure (scripts/, ${CLAUDE_SKILL_DIR}, allowed-tools), execution commands follow SKILL.md examples through uv run python, and log renamed to skill_execution.log. Added common directory aliases (--data-dir, --source-dir, --input-dir) across parse and index CLIs to prevent parameter mismatch.

README Task 2 section clarified the Claude Skills packaging boundary, script-based Skill execution evidence, uv run python dependency environment, committed fixture inputs, and stricter guidance to avoid running parse before index requests. Validation passed: README rg check, runtime_control JSON parse, and uv run python -m unittest -q tests/test_claude_skills.py.
